additional_diagnostics.message: 未检测到 TurboX 加速
suggestions: 检查应用是否支持 GPU Turbo
联系 Honor 系统工程师确认优化策略

additional_steps.description: 检查 GPU Turbo、Link Turbo 等优化是否生效
additional_steps.name: Honor TurboX 引擎检测
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as turbo_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  (s.ts - (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})) / 1e6 as relative_ts_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*TurboX*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*GPUTurbo*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*LinkTurbo*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*MagicOS*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*Honor*Boost*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.ts ASC

additional_steps.name: Honor 系统服务调用
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  server_process,
  client_dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  COUNT(*) as call_count
FROM android_binder_txns
WHERE client_process GLOB '${package}*'
  AND (server_process GLOB '*honor*'
       OR server_process GLOB '*Honor*'
       OR server_process GLOB '*magic*')
  AND client_ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND client_ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
GROUP BY server_process
ORDER BY SUM(client_dur) DESC

meta.description: 针对荣耀 MagicOS 优化的启动分析，包含 TurboX 检测
